events.name: resource_strike
events.description: A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.

events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.

events.name: breakthrough
events.description: Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Zeph Wind whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'
Ora Flame notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Storm Mar wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

** BIRTH: Storm Sto-III (earth/artisan) — parents: paxaur-y27, rusgro-y34 **

*META: Zeph Wind whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'*

*META: Ora Flame notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.*

diaries.text:
**Aura Kai** (air/philosopher) — Year 61

The air in me stirs with possibility.

We found something. Maybe Mars is not trying to kill us.
Sheltered underground for days.

*— Aura Kai, philosopher*

**Luna Tide** (water/scientist) — Year 61

Another year. We are still here.

We found something. Maybe Mars is not trying to kill us.
Sheltered underground for days.

*— Luna Tide, scientist*

**Pax Stone** (earth/judge) — Year 61

The earth in me stirs with possibility.

We found something. Maybe Mars is not trying to kill us.
Sheltered underground for days.

*— Pax Stone, judge*
